title: Implement Glassmorphism Card Component Library
description: Create reusable React card components with glassmorphism effect: semi-transparent backgrounds with blur, subtle borders, and glow effects on hover/focus. Build variants: TicketCard, AgentCard, StatCard, PanelCard. Include entrance animations and micro-interactions.
acceptance_criteria: Base GlassCard component with backdrop-blur-md and bg-white/10
Border uses gradient with portal-green accent
Hover state adds glow shadow and slight scale transform
Focus state shows visible ring for accessibility
TicketCard displays title, status badge, priority indicator, complexity chip
AgentCard shows avatar, name, status indicator, current task
Entrance animation uses framer-motion or CSS keyframes
agent_output: Implemented GlassCard component library with variants: default, portal, meeseeks, warning, success, error. Includes StatCard, InfoCard, AgentStatusCard, and EmptyState components.
